title: artanthe pilosiuscula
intro: Artanthe pilosiuscula, also known as the velvet starfish flower, is a plant species native to the tropical forests of Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which can be used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Artanthe pilosiuscula include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and promote wound healing. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a herbal tea or infused oil, and it can also be used in tincture or capsule form for its medicinal benefits.
